arts.ttl: Follow live: Arsenal look to boost title hopes with win at Palace

arts.sum: Bukayo Saka made his 250th appearance for Arsenal on Saturday afternoon in the team's Premier League match away at Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Emile Smith Rowe needs just one word to describe Mikel Arteta after Arsenal exit

arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has been putting his players through their paces in training ahead of Arsenal's clash against Crystal Palace. So, with that being said, football.london has spotted five things in training that you might have missed as Arsenal geared up to face Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Liverpool told to pay £40-50m for January target on Arsenal and Man United radar
arts.sum: Liverpool are keen on signing Antonee Robinson from Fulham in january. According to Football Insider, they will have to pay a fee of around £40-50 million in order to sign the USMNT star. arts.ttl: David Ornstein names player that Arsenal would sign in an ideal world
arts.sum: Arsenal need new players as soon as possible and particularly in the attacking positions. They have struggled to score goals this season and that is why they are currently a long way behind Premier League leaders Liverpool.
